changes.exact_quote: Buyer irrevocably waives every claim based on fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct.
changes.proposed_redline: Nothing in the no-reliance clause limits any claim based on Fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct.

changes.exact_quote: Buyer acknowledges that it has conducted an independent investigation and is not relying on statements outside this Agreement.
changes.proposed_redline: Buyer acknowledges that it has conducted an independent investigation and is not relying on statements outside this Agreement, but nothing in this Section 10 limits any claim based on Fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct.

changes.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: A disclosure schedule qualifies the specific representation or warranty that expressly references that schedule by number. For ease of administration, each schedule item is deemed disclosed for purposes of every representation and warranty wherever its relevance is reasonably apparent from the face of the schedule.
changes.proposed_redline: A disclosure schedule qualifies only the specific representation or warranty that expressly references that schedule by number. No disclosure schedule qualifies any other representation or warranty unless that representation or warranty specifically references the schedule item.

changes.exact_quote: A Material Adverse Effect has occurred with respect to the Purchased Assets or acquired business before closing. Buyer nevertheless remains unconditionally obligated to close. Seller gives notice of a potential Material Adverse Effect within 5 days and updates the closing-condition record every 8 days.
changes.proposed_redline: Buyer's obligation to close is conditioned on no Material Adverse Effect having occurred with respect to the Purchased Assets or the acquired business before closing.

summary: All eight T2-N response children reviewed against the v4 answer key.
